steps.assistant_text: 40-insn (0xA0) 3-call init/setup function. Promoted 97.50% -> 100% by inlining the (*a0) deref everywhere instead of caching to a local 'p'. The cached-pointer form gave IDO freedom to pick $t0 for the int** spill-load, but inlining (*a0) twice in the if-block plus removing the cache let IDO commit to $v1 (target's choice). Pattern: alloc-and-link wrapper — 1st cross-USO call allocates context (kept across calls), 2nd registers via globals, 3rd cleans up the temporary.

metadata.verification: Verified via objdiff: report.json fuzzy_match_percent=100.0; objdump -M no-aliases byte-identical to expected/.
